subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear division into introduction, methods, analysis and conclusion providing logical development
Effective use of headings, sub-headings and table of contents for navigation
Focused research question and succinctly articulated aim aligning with structure
weaknesses: Significant exceedance of the word limit with repeated definitions reduces conciseness
Large unused data dumps introduce irrelevant material
Some formatting errors (e.g. missing page numbers in contents) undermine polish
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration is coherent and well organized, with a logical flow supported by clear section headings and cross-referenced figures. However, the near doubling of the word count and repetitive or irrelevant data weaken conciseness. Two strands align with band 3 descriptors, but the serious conciseness issues prevent the top mark. A 3/4 reflects strong organization and logical development offset by limited relevance and concision.

strengths: Correct use of statistical symbols for hypotheses, matrices and ÏÂ² tests
Appropriate tables and state-diagrams that aid interpretation
weaknesses: Notational slips (e.g. unexplained âIIâ, misuse of â expressions) lead to inconsistency
Overly detailed data tables overwhelm clarity without accompanying graphs
Algebraic steps (stationary distribution) are presented but contain errors and lack justification
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands (language & notation, representations, clarity) fall within band 2: some appropriate use of mathematical language and notation, some representations, and mostly clear communication with inconsistencies. The candidate demonstrates basic but patchy mathematical communication, meriting 2/4.

strengths: Clear personal motivation driving choice of election-poll techniques
Evidence of independent thought in adapting the Markov model to missing data
Notable creativity in proposing a machine-learning extension
weaknesses: Execution errors limit the impact of independent thinking
Future techniques are suggested but lack concrete algorithmic detail
Creativity, while significant, does not consistently enhance analysis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work shows significant independent thinking, a clear personal approach and notable creativity, placing it consistently in band 2 across all strands. The engagement is strong but not outstanding, so 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on methodological choices, data limitations and surprising findings
Analysis of strengths and weaknesses of each statistical test with some critique
Reflections link results back to understanding of polling uncertainty
weaknesses: Depth of critical analysis is uneven and occasionally restates methodology
Limited exploration of alternative methods (e.g. regression rejection rationale)
Connections to enhanced understanding are clear but not deeply developed
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The reflection contains meaningful insights and critique, and clearly connects findings to the studentâs understanding, but lacks sustained depth and critical rigor required for band 3. All three strands align with band 2, so the score is 2/3.

strengths: Application of three HL-level methods (Markov chains, binomial tests, ÏÂ²) directly addresses the research question
Mathematical work is largely correct with only minor errors in rounding or notation
Demonstrates good understanding of course-level concepts and purposeful integration of techniques
weaknesses: Stationary distribution derivation contains a fundamental error
Undefined expressions (e.g. variance formula) indicate gaps in rigor
Rounding of expected frequencies affects test validity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration uses relevant course-level mathematics effectively and with only minor errors, demonstrating good understanding in parts. Although there are some inaccuracies and missed opportunities for deeper sophistication, the overall use of mathematics aligns with band 4 descriptors. Thus, 4/6 is justified.

strandSelections.reasoning: Choosing three distinct statistical techniques and adapting the Markov model when data were missing shows significant independent thought.  However, execution errors and reliance on textbook methods limit it from reaching âoutstandingâ.

The student explains each method and shows good understanding in parts, yet misconceptions (equal stationary probabilities, independence assumptions) reveal gaps.  This aligns with âgood understanding in partsâ.
Most numeric work (p-values, ÏÂ²) is correct, but the stationary distribution solution is wrong and rounding procedures are questionable.  Thus mathematics is âmostly correctâ with some errors.

The essay exceeds the 2 500-word guideline by almost double, repeats definitions already given, and includes large data dumps that are never fully used.  Consequently there is noticeable irrelevance and lack of concision, warranting a low-band award.

Correct symbols are used for hypotheses, matrices and ÏÂ², but several notational slips occur (e.g. Î¸ in a column heading, unexplained âIIâ, misuse of â expression).  The language is generally appropriate yet inconsistent, so âsome appropriate useâ fits best.

Most explanations are understandable, yet algebraic steps (stationary distribution solved wrongly) and rounding decisions are not always justified, producing inconsistency.  Overall clarity is âmostly clear with some consistencyâ, placing it in band 2.

Markov chains, binomial tests and ÏÂ² are all HL-level and relevant.  Theyâre applied purposefully to answer the research question, though sophistication (e.g., steady-state derivation) is limited, so âused effectivelyâ (4) rather than âsophisticatedâ (5-6).

Tables and three state-diagrams complement the text and aid understanding, but graphs of polling trends or clearer matrix layouts are absent.  Hence multiple representations are present but not fully exploited â aligning with the âsome appropriateâ tier.
The student reflects on methodological choices, data limitations and surprising findings, providing meaningful reflection throughout, though depth is not sustained critically enough for the top band.
Using Markov chains for polling drift and proposing machine-learning extensions demonstrates notable initiative and creativity, but not to an âoutstandingâ extent.

The investigation is divided into clear sections (introduction, rationale, methods, discussion, conclusion) and proceeds in a logical order from data collection to analysis to reflection.  Minor lapses in flow (e.g., duplicated explanations, abrupt jumps) prevent it from reaching the highest level, but overall the argument is easy to follow.

Strengths and weaknesses of each test are analysed and potential causes of bias discussed, evidencing âmeaningful analysis with some critiqueâ.  The critique is not consistently deep, so band 2 is appropriate.

Reflections repeatedly link findings to the studentâs understanding of polling uncertainty, indicating a clear connection to understanding without demonstrating the stronger âenhancedâ descriptor.

A contents table, headings, and sub-headings provide a recognisable introductionâbodyâconclusion structure.  Cross-referenced tables/figures support navigation.  Some formatting errors and misplaced citations reduce the polish, so it fits the âwell organisedâ rather than âexceptionallyâ descriptor.
The topic is personally motivated (interest in elections) and this motivation guides method selection and reflection, evidencing a clear personal approach that drives the exploration.

annotations.comment: Title clearly states the research question and scope, providing a focused investigation prompt.
The student exceeds the 2 500-word limit by almost double, introducing repetition and unfocused data; trim content for conciseness and relevance.
The contents table presents sections clearly, but omitting page numbers undermines navigational clarity; include page references for better structure.
Use of clear headings and sub-headings in the contents demonstrates effective organizational structure.
The student effectively links personal interest to the research context, demonstrating genuine engagement with the question.
Some sentences restate previously covered background, reducing conciseness; consolidate to maintain focus on the research aim.
The student critically examines source limitations and their impact, showing meaningful reflection on methodology.
The description of the Chi-Square test contains a typo (âincurvesâ) and unclear phrasing; revise for precise, formal mathematical language.
The extensive data table is comprehensive but overwhelming; summarise key trends with graphs to improve clarity and interpretation.
Candidate rows in the table lack labels (e.g., âHarris,â âTrumpâ), making interpretation difficult; include explicit headings for clarity.
The transition diagram effectively visualises state changes but lacks node labels and probabilities on arrows; annotate directly for self-contained interpretation.
The tableâs column headers (âIIâ, âÎ¸ Eâ) are unexplained and notation is inconsistent; define symbols explicitly to ensure comprehension.
The description of data sources would benefit from noting specific collection dates and dataset versions to strengthen reproducibility.
The rationale outlines method choices well; consider explaining why regression was rejected compared to Markov chains for further clarity.
Demonstrating initiative, the student selects three distinct HL-level techniques aligning well with the research aims.
The aim is articulated succinctly and aligns directly with the research question, enhancing the investigationâs focus.
The expression $$\sqrt{\frac{1}{1-1}-\frac{1}{1-1}}$$ is undefined; review derivation of variance or error metrics, ensuring valid mathematical operations.
The derivation of the stationary distribution oversimplifies the eigenvector calculation; re-solve $$T\mathbf{v}=\mathbf{v}$$ and include normalization constraints.
When applying the binomial test, explicitly discuss the independence assumption of polls and its potential violation to deepen critical analysis.
Rounding expected frequencies alters the testâs validity; consider using exact decimal values or adjusted corrections (e.g., Yatesâ) for small samples.
The evaluation largely restates earlier methodology rather than offering new insights; deepen critical assessment by linking method strengths and limitations to specific results.
A rationale for choosing the 5% significance level would strengthen justification; discuss implications for Type I/II error trade-offs in context.
The student identifies multiple plausible sources of bias and connects them effectively to the statistical findings, demonstrating meaningful critical analysis.
The claim regarding persistence of underpredictions requires quantitative support (e.g., citing transition probabilities); include data references to substantiate this conclusion.
The suggestion of future machine-learning techniques is forward-looking, but detailing specific model frameworks or algorithms would deepen engagement.
Adjusting the timeframe addresses missing data but may bias transition probabilities; reflect on how this substitution affects model validity and results.
The conclusion summarizes findings but would benefit from explicitly linking back to the original research question for full closure.

The exploration is highly coherent with excellent logical development

Communication is partially clear with inconsistencies
Limited use of appropriate mathematical language and notation
Communication is mostly clear with some consistency

Communication is clear and mostly consistent
Mostly appropriate mathematical language and notation throughout
Effective use of multiple mathematical representations
Communication is clear and consistent throughout
Sophisticated use of multiple mathematical representations
Consistent and accurate mathematical language and notation throughout
Clear personal approach that drives the exploration
Highly personal approach that enhances understanding
Some relevant mathematics at appropriate level
Relevant mathematics at course level used
Mathematics is correct with minor errors
Relevant mathematics at course level used effectively
Sophisticated relevant mathematics at course level
Mathematics is correct and shows sophistication
Mathematics is precise and demonstrates sophistication
Sophisticated and rigorous mathematics at course level
